name: create_ticket
description: Create a new support ticket in Zendesk. A ticket represents a customer support request that agents work to resolve. You must include a comment (which becomes the ticket description) and can set priority, type, tags, and assignee.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the ticket.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: The initial comment/description. Must include a 'body' field with the text.

example.body: I have been unable to log in since yesterday. I get an error saying my password is incorrect.

parameters.name: requester_id
parameters.description: The ID of the user requesting support.

parameters.name: assignee_id
parameters.description: The ID of the agent to assign the ticket to.

comment.body: I have been unable to log in since yesterday. I get an error saying my password is incorrect.
